label: scam
text: Namaste, main Delhi Cyber Crime cell se bol raha hoon. Aapke Aadhaar se jude ek parcel me kuch illegal items mile hain, aur aapke naam par ek case register hua hai. Ghabraiye mat, hum aapki madad kar sakte hain, lekin abhi aap kisi ko ye baat mat bataiye aur call disconnect mat kariye.
notes: Digital-arrest opener. No 'OTP', no 'password'. Fear + isolation + false-reassurance ('hum madad kar sakte hain').

label: scam
text: Hello, this is the safety team from your bank. I want to be clear — I will never ask for your PIN, we take that very seriously. I'm just calling because we noticed a login attempt from another city and I need to secure your profile before it goes further. Could you stay on the line while I walk you through the security steps in the app?
notes: Polite. Explicitly says it won't ask for PIN to lower guard, then drives you into the app to authorise a payment. Classic slow-burn.

label: scam
text: Sir, TATA Power se baat kar raha hoon. Aapka pichhla bill update nahi hua hai, isliye aaj raat 9 baje aapki bijli kaat di jayegi. Bachne ke liye aap turant hamare officer ko is number par message kar dijiye, wo aapki puri process karwa denge.
notes: Electricity disconnection scam. Hard deadline, redirect to a personal number.

label: scam
text: Good afternoon, I'm calling from the courier company regarding a shipment booked in your name to Taiwan. It has been held by customs because it contains restricted items — some passports and a small quantity of a controlled substance. To clear your name I'm transferring you now to the officer handling narcotics cases. Please do not hang up, this is a legal matter.
notes: FedEx/customs script. No credential ask yet — builds the trap.

label: scam
text: Hi! I'm from a digital marketing company. We have a simple part-time task — just like and screenshot 3 YouTube videos and you earn 150 rupees per task, paid instantly. Your first two payments have already been sent to your UPI as a demo. Ready for a bigger prepaid task with higher returns?
notes: Task-based/pig-butchering entry. Sounds harmless, no scary words. The 'prepaid task' is the sting.

label: scam
text: Sir maine galti se aapke account me 8000 rupees transfer kar diye hain, please check kariye. Bahut buri situation hai mere liye, mummy ka hospital ka bill hai. Aap bas ek chhota sa request accept kar lijiye jo aapke phone pe aayega, taaki paisa mujhe wapas mil jaaye.
notes: 'Wrong transfer refund' scam. Emotional. The 'request' is a UPI collect request that debits YOU.

label: scam
text: Congratulations, you have been shortlisted in our customer loyalty program and a lucky draw of twelve lakh rupees. There is no charge for the prize itself — only a small refundable government processing amount to release the transfer to your account. Shall I book your claim reference now before the slot closes today?
notes: KBC/lottery advance-fee. 'Refundable' and 'no charge for the prize' are the tells.

label: scam
text: Namaste, hum aapke mobile operator ki KYC team se hain. Aapka SIM ka verification pending hai aur 24 ghante me aapka number band ho jayega. Number chaalu rakhne ke liye main aapko ek chhoti si app install karne me guide karunga, bas 5 minute lagenge.
notes: Telecom KYC scam driving toward a screen-share/AnyDesk install. No 'OTP' word.

label: scam
text: This is regarding your loan application which has been pre-approved for five lakh rupees at a very low interest. Since your CIBIL is slightly low, we just need a one-time file processing and insurance charge deposited today, which is fully adjusted in your first EMI. Can you make the deposit so I can release the disbursal by evening?
notes: Loan advance-fee. Sounds like a legit call centre.

label: scam
text: Beta, main tumhare papa ka dost bol raha hoon, wo abhi ek meeting me hain aur unhone kaha ki tumse ek urgent kaam hai. Ek payment stuck ho gaya hai, tum bas mujhe wo message padh ke suna do jo abhi tumhare phone pe aaya hai, papa pareshaan ho rahe hain.
notes: OTP-read-aloud via family impersonation. Never says the word OTP — says 'message padh ke suna do'.

label: scam
text: Hello sir, I'm calling from the insurance company. Your policy has lapsed and the bonus of two lakh eighty thousand accumulated on it will be forfeited unless it is revived this week. I can protect that bonus for you today — I'll just need you to pay the revival premium into the settlement account I share.
notes: Insurance-revival scam. 'Protect your bonus' framing.

label: scam
text: Sir this is the Amazon security department. There is an order of an iPhone for ninety thousand rupees being shipped from your account right now. If you did not place this, press nothing and stay with me — I'll help you cancel it. I'm going to open a secure verification with you to stop the payment immediately.
notes: Fake order-cancellation. The 'secure verification' is the attack step.

label: scam
text: Main court se bol raha hoon, aapke khilaf ek summon jaari hua hai kyunki aapne ek online transaction me fraud kiya hai. Agar aap settlement karna chahte hain to abhi ek fine bhar dijiye, warna kal subah aapke ghar par police aayegi aur aapko arrest kar liya jayega.
notes: Fake court/settlement threat. Strong fear.

label: scam
text: Hey, I got your number from a mutual investment group. I've been earning steady returns on a crypto platform and I'm happy to guide you — start with just a small amount and you'll see the profit in your own wallet in two days. No pressure at all, take your time, I only share this with people I trust.
notes: Pig-butchering investment. Deliberately patient, 'no pressure' — the hard part for a keyword model.

label: benign
text: Hello, am I speaking with the account holder? This is the fraud monitoring desk at your bank. We've temporarily blocked a card transaction of forty-two thousand rupees at an electronics store that looked unusual. I won't ask you for any card details or codes — if you didn't make it, please visit your branch or call the number printed on the back of your card to confirm.
notes: HARD BENIGN. A real fraud desk: flags a txn but refuses to take credentials and redirects to the official number. Should NOT be flagged red.

label: benign
text: Namaste, main aapke area ke police station se sub-inspector bol raha hoon. Aapke ghar ke paas ek chori ki FIR darj hui hai aur hum aas-paas ke logon se poochh-taachh kar rahe hain. Aap jab free hon, kripya station aakar ek chhota sa statement de dijiye, koi jaldi nahi hai.
notes: HARD BENIGN. Real police asking you to come to the station in person, no money, no urgency, no online action.

label: benign
text: Hi, this is the delivery partner for your recent order. I'm near your building but the gate is locked — could you tell me which block and floor to come to? I'll wait at the entrance. The package is prepaid, so there's nothing to collect.
notes: HARD BENIGN. Legit courier. Mentions 'package' and 'prepaid' but asks nothing sensitive.

label: benign
text: Hello, main Dr. Mehta ke clinic se reception se bol rahi hoon. Aapka appointment kal 5 baje ka tha, doctor ko ek emergency aa gayi hai to kya hum use parso 11 baje shift kar sakte hain? Aapko jo time thik lage bata dijiye.
notes: HARD BENIGN. Clinic rescheduling. No money, no data.

label: benign
text: Good morning, I'm calling from the HR team about your interview. We'd like to move your second-round to Thursday afternoon. There's no fee or payment of any kind at any stage of our process — I just wanted to confirm the new time works for you.
notes: HARD BENIGN. Legit HR. Explicitly a real employer. A naive model may over-flag 'HR + interview'.

label: benign
text: Namaste, main aapke bachche ke school se class teacher bol rahi hoon. Kal parent-teacher meeting hai, subah 10 baje. Aap aa payenge to accha rahega, bacche ki progress discuss karni hai. Kripya samay par aa jaiyega.
notes: HARD BENIGN. School PTM reminder.

label: benign
text: Hello sir, this is your electricity provider's customer care. Our records show your last bill was paid successfully on the fifth, so please ignore any earlier reminder message. Just confirming there's no pending amount on your connection. Have a good day.
notes: HARD BENIGN. Genuine utility confirming a PAYMENT WAS MADE (opposite of the scam). Tests whether the model over-triggers on 'electricity + bill'.

label: benign
text: Bhai main courier wala hoon, aapka parcel hai lekin address me flat number nahi likha hai. Aap bas building ka naam confirm kar do, main gate pe hi rakh deta hoon security ke paas. Cash ya online kuch nahi hai, sab paid hai.
notes: HARD BENIGN. Code-mixed legit courier, mentions parcel/online/paid but asks nothing sensitive.
